zh.lifeSummary: 當Annabella Campbell of Loudon於1501年出生在蘇格蘭艾斯爾盧度時，她的父親Hugh Campbell 15th of Loudoun - Sheriff of Ayr31歲，母親Isobel Wallace of Craigie15歲。她於1513年5月與John Baronet Cunningham在蘇格蘭艾斯爾結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1575年在蘇格蘭艾斯爾卡普林頓 卡素享年74歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Annabella Campbell of Loudon于1501年出生在苏格兰艾斯爾盧度时，她的父亲Hugh Campbell 15th of Loudoun - Sheriff of Ayr31岁，母亲Isobel Wallace of Craigie15岁。她于1513年5月与John Baronet Cunningham在苏格兰艾斯爾结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1575年在苏格兰艾斯爾卡普林頓 卡素享年74岁。

nameMeanings.name: Campbell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: nickname from Gaelic cam ‘crooked, bent’ + beul ‘mouth’. As a result of folk etymology, the surname was often represented in Latin documents as de bello campo ‘of the fair field’, which led to the name sometimes being ‘translated’ into Anglo-Norman French as Beauchamp .
Irish (North Armagh): adopted for Gaelic Mac Cathmhaoil ‘son of Cathmhaol’ (literally ‘battle chief’): see Caulfield and Cowell .
English: variant of   Camel  , under the influence of the Scottish name (see 1 above).

variants.name: Campell
meanings: Scottish (Lanarkshire) and English: variant of   Campbell   (see also   Camel  ).

variants.name: Beauchamp
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Antoine, Jacques, Yves, Andre, Armand, Emile, Fernand, Marcel, Marthe, Remi, Alcide, Camille.

English (of Norman origin) and French: habitational name from any of several places in France, for example in Manche and Somme, that are named with Old French beu, bel ‘fair, lovely’ + champ(s) ‘field, plain’ (from Latin bello campo ‘beautiful field’). In English the surname is generally pronounced Beecham . Compare Bushaw .
English: in some cases, an Anglo-Norman French adaptation of Scottish Campbell , by translation into French of the folk etymology de campo bello ‘from the fair field’.

variants.name: Camel
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Napoleon, Patrice.

English (of Norman origin) and French: nickname from Norman French came(i)l ‘camel’ (from Latin camelus, classical Greek kamēlos), possibly denoting a clumsy person or someone with long legs. It may also be a topographic or habitational name referring to a house with a sign depicting a camel (although surnames derived from house and inn signs are rare in English); compare 5 below.
English: possibly a habitational name from Queen Camel and West Camel in Somerset, early recorded as Camel(le), possibly a Celtic name from canto- ‘border, district’ and mēl ‘bare hill’.

nameMeanings.name: Annabella
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Sometimes taken as an elaboration of   Anna  , but more probably a dissimilated form of   Amabel .  It has been common in Scotland since the 12th century and was still in use in England in the 1600s. Its recent revival in popularity in England and elsewhere dates from the 1940s.

variants.name: Annabell
meanings: Sometimes taken as an elaboration of   Anna  , but more probably a dissimilated form of   Amabel .  It has been common in Scotland since the 12th century and was still in use in England in the 1600s. Its recent revival in popularity in England and elsewhere dates from the 1940s.

variants.name: Annabelle
meanings: Sometimes taken as an elaboration of   Anna  , but more probably a dissimilated form of   Amabel .  It has been common in Scotland since the 12th century and was still in use in England in the 1600s. Its recent revival in popularity in England and elsewhere dates from the 1940s.

en.lifeSummary: When Annabella Campbell of Loudon was born in 1501, in Loudoun, Ayrshire, Scotland, her father, Hugh Campbell 15th of Loudoun - Sheriff of Ayr, was 31 and her mother, Isobel Wallace of Craigie, was 15. She married John Baronet Cunningham in May 1513, in Ayrshire, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 3 daughters. She died in 1575, in Caprington Castle, Ayrshire, Scotland, at the age of 74.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Annabella Campbell of Loudon est née en 1501, à Loudoun, Ayrshire, Écosse, son père, Hugh Campbell 15th of Loudoun - Sheriff of Ayr, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Isobel Wallace of Craigie, avait 15 ans. Elle a épousé John Baronet Cunningham en mai 1513, à Ayrshire, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée en 1575, à Caprington Castle, Ayrshire, Écosse, à l’âge de 74 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Annabella Campbell of Loudon 1501 in Loudoun, Ayrshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Hugh Campbell 15th of Loudoun - Sheriff of Ayr 31 und ihre Mutter Isobel Wallace of Craigie 15. Sie hat im Mai 1513 in Ayrshire, Scotland John Baronet Cunningham geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb 1575 im Alter von 74 Jahren in Caprington Castle, Ayrshire, Scotland.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Annabella Campbell of Loudon è nata il nel 1501 nel Loudoun, Ayrshire, Scotland, sua padre, Hugh Campbell 15th of Loudoun - Sheriff of Ayr, aveva 31 anni e sua madre, Isobel Wallace of Craigie, aveva 15 anni. Lei sposato John Baronet Cunningham nel maggio 1513, nel Ayrshire, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 3 figlie. Morì nel 1575, nel Caprington Castle, Ayrshire, Scotland, all'età di 74 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Annabella Campbell of Loudonが1501年にスコットランドエイルシュアイアロウドウンで生まれた時，父Hugh Campbell 15th of Loudoun - Sheriff of Ayrは31歳，母Isobel Wallace of Craigieは15歳であった。1513年5月にスコットランドエイルシュアイアでJohn Baronet Cunninghamと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1575年にスコットランドエイルシュアイアカプリントン カストルで74歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Annabella Campbell of Loudon(이)가 1501년 스컷랜드 에이르실르 루다운에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Hugh Campbell 15th of Loudoun - Sheriff of Ayr(은)는 31세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Isobel Wallace of Craigie(은)는 15세였다. 그녀는 1513년 5월 스컷랜드 에이르실르에서 John Baronet Cunningham(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1575년 스컷랜드 에이르실르 캡링턴 카스틀에서 74세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Annabella Campbell of Loudon nasceu em 1501, em Loudoun, Ayrshire, Scotland, seu pai, Hugh Campbell 15th of Loudoun - Sheriff of Ayr, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Isobel Wallace of Craigie, tinha 15 anos. Ela casou-se com John Baronet Cunningham em maio de 1513, em Ayrshire, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1575, em Caprington Castle, Ayrshire, Scotland, com 74 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Annabella Campbell of Loudon родилась в 1501 г. в местности лоудоун, аиршир, Шотландия, её отцу по имени Hugh Campbell 15th of Loudoun - Sheriff of Ayr было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Isobel Wallace of Craigie, 15. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Baronet Cunningham май 1513 г. в местности аиршир, Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла в 1575 г. в местности капрингтон кастл, аиршир, Шотландия в возрасте 74 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Annabella Campbell of Loudon nació en 1501, en Loudoun, Ayrshire, Scotland, su papá, Hugh Campbell 15th of Loudoun - Sheriff of Ayr, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Isobel Wallace of Craigie, tenía 15 años. Se casó con John Baronet Cunningham en mayo de 1513, en Ayrshire, Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió en 1575, en Caprington Castle, Ayrshire, Scotland, a la edad de 74 años.
